case_title: ANDREA STEINER VS. JONATHAN KAPLAN DR ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEINER, ANDREA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAPLAN DR, JONATHAN KAPLAN MRS, KELSEY RYPL AS NOTED IN THE JUDGMENT IN CSM-18-858267, LANDLORD HAS NOT CARRIED HER BURDEN OF PROOF OF DAMAGE TO THE UNIT. I FURTHER FIND THAT THE EVIDENCE SHOWED RENT CHECKS WERE TIMELY SENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED AUG-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN MRS, KELSEY RYPL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED AUG-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN DR, JONATHAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY STEINER, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN DR, JONATHAN KAPLAN MRS, KELSEY RYPL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT KAPLAN DR, JONATHAN KAPLAN MRS, KELSEY RYPL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-22-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT ANDREA STEINER. DEFENDANT JONATHAN KAPLAN AND KELSEY RYPL KAPLAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED IN CROSS CASE CSM 18-858267. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
